seoTitle: Perth Airport vs Petrudor — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Perth Airport and Petrudor. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Perth Airport vs Petrudor: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Perth Airport and Petrudor.
heading: Perth Airport vs Petrudor — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Perth Airport, Western Australia and Petrudor, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Petrudor has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Perth Airport (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Perth Airport or Petrudor safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Perth Airport has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Petrudor scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Perth Airport scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Petrudor scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Perth Airport or Petrudor?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Petrudor has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
